Name: Adit Sahai
Desciption:
Adit Sahai is a student who currently lives in Gurugram, Haryana. He is also the author of “The Mystery of the Bermuda Triangle”, which was published in 2023.  
Adit likes to watch and play a variety of sports like Football, Tennis, Badminton, but Crickets stands out amongst all. His favorite player in the sport is Virat Kohli, who serves as his idol. He has always supported the cricketer through his ups and downs, reflecting his love towards Kohli’s contribution to the game and the nation.  
Since childhood, Adit has had a fond of Space, and the depths of the Universe. From learning about the Solar System, to the stargazing of planets with his telescope, Adit has always maintained his passion with him throughout the years. He currently also likes to do Astrophotography, capturing various star constellations, planets and the Moon, all with a phone camera. In the future, he aspires to work in the field of Astronomy, and become an Astronomer, to fulfill his dream of exploring, discovering and learning about the depths of deep, outer space.  
Apart from Astronomy, Adit has various hobbies, which keep him busy throughout the day. He likes to solve the Rubik’s Cube, with an average time taken for a 3×3 cube being 11 seconds. He also likes to play the Piano and primarily Guitar, learning old Bollywood songs, along the way.  
Writing has been one aspect of Adit’s life, which has defined his character. From short English/Hindi poetry to whole entire books, Adit has acquired a skill for so. He hopes to keep this skill alive for as long as he can, and write lots of more books along the way.  
Adit loves to go to science exhibitions, planetariums and museums to enhance his knowledge. In his free time, he loves to read, learn facts and star gaze!
